title: Overhead View of Hands Chopping Red Bell Pepper with Fresh Vegetables and Herbs on Kitchen Counter
description: Square overhead shot of a kitchen counter featuring hands chopping a red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board surrounded by fresh vegetables including red and yellow bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, leafy greens, chopped garlic, diced red onion, fresh herbs, olive oil, and seasoning bowls. Bright natural lighting highlights the vibrant colors and textures of the fresh ingredients, with a neutral kitchen surface background.
